summary: Iteration 10 fully verified. Backend: 13/13 pytest tests PASS covering GET /api/settings returning correct Arabic defaults for the 4 new template fields (customer_debt_template, customer_payment_template, supplier_debt_template, supplier_payment_template), PUT /api/settings updating each template individually while preserving the other 3 + reminder_template (verified via GET), isolated PUT of supplier_debt_template only, employee GET allowed / employee PUT → 403 (CurrentOwner), and full restore-to-defaults cleanup. Frontend: signed in as testuser/test1234, opened Settings via open-settings-button on home. All 4 new textareas render with the exact defaults prefilled (settings-customer-debt-template, settings-customer-payment-template, settings-supplier-debt-template, settings-supplier-payment-template). Set all 4 to distinctive markers (CUSTOMER-DEBT-TEST, CUSTOMER-PAY-TEST, SUPPLIER-DEBT-TEST, SUPPLIER-PAY-TEST) each with {name}/{amount}/{currency}/{balance} placeholders and tapped settings-save → settings-saved shows 'تم حفظ الإعدادات'. Executed all 4 tx flows (customer+debt, customer+payment, supplier+debt, supplier+payment) on real records — reminder-prompt-modal preview correctly contains the marker AND all placeholders {name}, {amount}, {currency}, {balance} are substituted (no literal placeholder text present). Example previews: 'مرحباً TEST_UI_CUST_EDITED، CUSTOMER-DEBT-TEST مبلغ 12 دينار رصيد 133.5' and 'مرحباً V10_TEST_SUP، SUPPLIER-PAY-TEST دفعت 12 دينار رصيد 0'. Cleanup done: templates restored to server.py Settings defaults (verified via GET), V10_TEST_SUP supplier deleted, both amount=12 test transactions deleted from the existing customer.

issues: Modal title is hard-coded to 'إرسال تذكير للزبون؟' (Send reminder to customer) even when party_type=supplier. Preview content itself is correct and uses the supplier template, but the title copy is customer-centric. Consider 'إرسال تذكير للمورد؟' when partyType==='supplier' (or a neutral wording). Cosmetic only; not blocking.

react_native_issues.issue: Console still emits 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — same as iteration 8. Non-blocking but should be migrated.

action_items: (Optional, minor UX) In /app/frontend/app/(app)/add-transaction.tsx line 423, make the modal title 'إرسال تذكير للزبون؟' party-aware — use 'المورد' when partyType==='supplier'.
(Optional, low priority) Migrate remaining shadow*/pointerEvents deprecations to boxShadow / style.pointerEvents.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend Settings model in /app/backend/server.py lines 151-172 correctly declares all 4 new template fields with the Arabic defaults; SettingsUpdate mirrors them as Optional. get_settings_doc lazy-inserts defaults on first read so a brand-new owner sees the exact strings.

PUT /api/settings (line 1036-1043) uses SettingsUpdate.dict(exclude_unset=True) implicitly via `updates` — verified idempotent per-field: updating only supplier_debt_template preserves the other 3 templates + reminder_template.

Frontend /app/frontend/src/utils/whatsapp.ts buildTransactionMessage correctly derives the template key from `${partyType}_${txType}_template` and interpolates {name}/{shop}/{amount}/{balance}/{currency}. Fallback to DEFAULT_TEMPLATES when the server field is undefined is safe.

add-transaction.tsx passes partyType=(customer.party_type==='supplier'?'supplier':'customer') so the correct template is selected. Confirmed at runtime with the SUPPLIER-DEBT-TEST / SUPPLIER-PAY-TEST previews on a supplier record.
No literal {balance}/{amount}/{name} strings observed in any of the 4 reminder previews — interpolation is complete.

success_rate.frontend: 100% for all 4 template flows in the review request

seed_data_creation: Created supplier V10_TEST_SUP via UI (deleted at end). Employee account v10_emp_* created in pytest and deleted in TestZZZRestoreAndCleanup. Two amount=12 test transactions on the existing customer TEST_UI_CUST_EDITED also deleted at end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 introduced 4 editable transaction-message templates on /api/settings. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_daftari_v10.py. Frontend testIDs on settings screen: settings-customer-debt-template, settings-customer-payment-template, settings-supplier-debt-template, settings-supplier-payment-template, plus existing settings-template (reminder). Reminder modal has testID reminder-prompt-modal and inner text carries the interpolated message. To force a supplier flow, use tab-supplier on home and add-customer-fab to create a supplier record. Backend defaults for the 4 templates are defined in Settings BaseModel in server.py lines 158-161 — those exact strings are what the restore step writes back.
rca_of_issue: Not applicable — no bugs found. Feature works as designed.
